C

Cell - Class in un.caen.util
The `Cell` class provides methods for managing the item contained within the cell.
Cell() - Constructor for class un.caen.util.Cell
 
CELL_SIZE - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The size of each cell in the grid (in pixels).
checkGameOver() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Checks if the game is over.
clearCell() - Method in class un.caen.util.Cell
The `clearCell()` method removes the item currently contained within the cell, effectively clearing the cell.
clearTrace() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Clears the trace of actions in the game.
clearTrace() - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Clears all trace items from the grid.
Config - Class in un.caen.config
The Config class contains constant configuration values for the game.
Config() - Constructor for class un.caen.config.Config
 
ConsoleView - Class in un.caen.view
 
ConsoleView(GameController) - Constructor for class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
createHeavyPlayer(int, String, Strategy) - Static method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerFactory
Creates a new `HeavyFighter` object with the given parameters.
createLightPlayer(int, String, Strategy) - Static method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerFactory
Creates a new `LightFighter` object with the given parameters.
